since_last: 41% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.27%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +2.05% · Gold -0.45% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 41% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.27%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.27%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +18.25%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +18.25%, VRT +6.30%, MU +5.29%, INTC +5.02%, PWR +4.90%. Laggards: SPCX -10.58%, AVAV -9.95%, ARM -7.00%, PLTR -6.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.58% at $165.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.58% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
